title: Code Enforcement
headline: Streamline Code Enforcement
subheadline: Modernize how your city tracks, manages, and resolves code violations with a single platform.
body: Tolemi's Code Enforcement solution gives city staff a centralized dashboard to manage violations from report to resolution. With built-in mapping, automated notifications, and real-time status tracking, your team can resolve cases faster and keep residents informed every step of the way.

features.title: Violation Mapping
features.description: See all active violations on an interactive map with filtering by type, status, and date.

features.title: Automated Notifications
features.description: Send automated letters and emails to property owners at every stage of the enforcement process.

features.title: Case Management
features.description: Track each case from initial report through inspection, hearing, and resolution in one place.

features.title: Reporting & Analytics
features.description: Generate compliance reports and identify trends across neighborhoods and violation types.
